title: Sales Consultant (Luxury/ Camera) - JL18
description:
5 days work, must be able work on weekends/ public holiday/ Eve of public holiday.
Location: Various location at central
Basic + Commission

1. Sales and CustomerEngagement:

· Proactively engage with customers to understand their photography needsand preferences.

· Provide expert guidance and recommendations on camera products, lenses, and accessories.

· Demonstrate camera features and functionalities to potential buyers.

· Close sales and meet or exceed sales targets.

2. Product Knowledge:

· Maintain a deep understanding of camera's product line, including thelatest models, features, and technology.

· Stay updated on industry trends and competitive products.

· Conduct product training sessions for colleagues and customers.

3. Customer Service:

· Provide exceptional customer service, ensuring customer satisfaction and loyalty.

· Handle inquiries, concerns, and warranty-related issues withprofessionalism and efficiency.

· Assist customers in troubleshooting and basic camera operations.

4. Sales Support:

· Collaborate with the sales team to achieve overall store salesobjectives.

· Assist in inventory management, restocking, and visual merchandising.

· Participate in marketing campaigns and promotions to drive sales.

5. Technical Expertise:

· Stay current with the technical aspects of camera systems, includingsensor technology, lens specifications, and imaging software.

· Offer technical advice and support to customers, especially advancedphotographers.

6. Documentation and Reporting:

· Maintain accurate records of sales transactions, customer interactions,and inventory levels.

· Prepare regular sales reports for management.

7. Teamwork:

· Foster a collaborative and positive work environment within the salesteam.

· Share knowledge and best practices with colleagues.

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now”or email ref44@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed tosafeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data ProtectionAct (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
